title: BEM-918 read context docs
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx_text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
# Scan repo for relevant technical documentation and implementation files.
patterns = [
    'governance/**/*.md',
    'governance/**/*.json',
    'governance/**/*.yml',
    'governance/**/*.yaml',
    'governance/**/*.py',
    '.github/workflows/*.yml',
    'src/**/*.ts', 'src/**/*.js', 'api/**/*.ts', 'api/**/*.js', 'server*.ts', 'main.ts', 'bot*.ts'
]
files = []
for pat in patterns:
    files.extend([p for p in Path('.').glob(pat) if p.is_file()])
keywords = ['telegram','webhook','bot','autonomy','dispatch','consumer','curator','director','general','workflow_dispatch','codex','runner','issue_comment','safe-run','gpt-safe']
relevant = []
for p in files:
    s = str(p)
    low = s.lower()
    score = sum(1 for k in keywords if k in low)
    try:
        txt = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:6000]
        score += sum(2 for k in keywords if k in txt.lower())
    except Exception:
        txt = ''
    if score:
        relevant.append((score, s, txt[:1200].replace('\n',' ')[:1200]))
relevant = sorted(relevant, reverse=True)[:80]
key_context = []
for line in ctx_text.splitlines():
    low = line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['bem-913','bem-914','bem-915','bem-916','bem-917','telegram','claude','remediation','consumer','proof','operator','next']):
        key_context.append(line)
out = '# BEM-918 context and technical docs scan\nStatus: READ\n\n## AGENT_CONTEXT key lines\n' + '\n'.join(key_context[-260:]) + '\n\n## Relevant files\n'
for score, s, snippet in relevant:
    out += f'\n### score={score} | {s}\n{snippet}\n'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM918_CONTEXT_TECH_DOCS_SCAN.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text(out, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM918 read AGENT_CONTEXT and scanned technical docs')
"""
No issue comments.
